notes: v0.1.9 fixes silent non-upgrades and selects the highest semantic-version package instead of the newest file timestamp.
Bootstrap refreshes managed AGENTS guidance and verifies the installed version after replacement.
Live ExecutionPolicy has one authoritative active-task owner; execution protocol records are agent-authored evidence, not runtime telemetry.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback; v0.1.8 has been retired from public distribution.
